_comment: Cowork ↔ Claude Code handover file. Both tools read and write this. See HANDOVER-PROTOCOL.md for rules.

CHI-5.title: Core Scaffolding
CHI-5.notes: All 5 tasks complete (CHI-8, CHI-9, CHI-10, CHI-11, CHI-12). Epic ready to close.

CHI-7.title: Basic UI
CHI-7.notes: All 9 tasks complete (CHI-17,18,19,20,21,22,23,24,26). Epic complete. Phase 1 Foundation done.

CHI-8.title: Scaffold Tauri v2 project with Rust backend
CHI-8.notes: Tauri v2 scaffold complete. cargo tauri dev launches window. Min window 1024x640 set. Capabilities directory configured. Vite dev server on port 1420. Bridge code preserved. All 43 tests pass. Git repo initialized.

CHI-9.title: Configure SolidJS 2.x + TailwindCSS v4 frontend
CHI-9.notes: SolidJS 1.9.11 + TailwindCSS 4.2.0 configured. All SPEC-002 tokens in src/styles/tokens.css via @theme. Prettier + ESLint per GUIDE-001. TypeScript strict with @/ path aliases. IPC type stubs in src/lib/types.ts. vite build produces 10.56 KB CSS + 6.99 KB JS. All checks pass (typecheck, lint, format).

CHI-10.title: Set up CI/CD pipeline
CHI-10.notes: GitHub Actions CI with matrix builds: frontend (typecheck, lint, format) on ubuntu, Rust (test on 3 OSes, fmt + clippy on ubuntu), Tauri build on all 3 platforms. All clippy warnings fixed across bridge and db modules. All checks pass locally.

CHI-11.title: Implement SQLite database layer with migration system
CHI-11.notes: SQLite at ~/.chiefwiggum/db/chiefwiggum.sqlite. WAL mode + foreign keys. Forward-only migration system with schema_version table. 6 data tables (projects, sessions, messages, agents, cost_events, budgets) + indexes. Typed query functions in db/queries.rs. 12 unit tests (5 migration + 7 query). Database initializes on app startup. 55 total tests pass.

CHI-12.title: Create CLAUDE.md agent auto-briefing file
CHI-12.notes: CLAUDE.md created with full project context. Handover system established.

CHI-13.title: Implement PTY process spawning for Claude Code CLI
CHI-13.notes: CliBridge with PTY via portable-pty. MockBridge for testing. 5 unit tests.

CHI-14.title: Build structured output parser for CLI responses
CHI-14.notes: StreamParser with chunk-aware JSON parsing. 9 event types. 11 unit tests.

CHI-15.title: Create versioned adapter interface for CLI format changes
CHI-15.notes: AdapterRegistry with version detection and fallback. 7 unit tests.

CHI-16.title: Implement permission request interception from CLI
CHI-16.notes: PermissionManager with async request/resolve, auto-allow rules, timeout auto-deny. 10 unit tests.

CHI-17.title: Build main layout shell (5-zone structure)
CHI-17.notes: 5-zone layout: TitleBar (custom, decorations:false), Sidebar (togglable, width transition), MainContent (view tabs + content), DetailsPanel (togglable, collapsible sections), StatusBar. Keyboard shortcuts: Cmd+B sidebar, Cmd+Shift+B details, Cmd+1-4 views. lucide-solid + @tauri-apps/api added.

CHI-18.title: Implement conversation view with markdown/code rendering
CHI-18.notes: Conversation view with marked + highlight.js for markdown/code rendering. MessageBubble with role labels, model badges, timestamp/cost footer. Auto-scroll with scroll-lock. Empty state + loading indicator. Mock responses for testing. Code blocks with copy buttons.

CHI-19.title: Build message input component with send controls
CHI-19.notes: Auto-expanding textarea (80-300px), Enter to send, Shift+Enter newline, Cmd+Enter force send. Send/Stop buttons with accent/error colors. Character count. Auto-focus on mount. Wired into MainLayout conversation view.

CHI-20.title: Implement model selector (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku)
CHI-20.notes: ModelSelector dropdown in TitleBar center. 3 models (Sonnet, Opus, Haiku) with colored dot badges. Cmd+M cycles models. update_session_model IPC command + DB query. Click-outside close. ARIA attributes. 64 Rust tests pass.

CHI-21.title: Integrate Terminal Mode with xterm.js + WebGL
CHI-21.notes: xterm.js v5 with WebGL addon for GPU rendering, FitAddon for auto-resize, SPEC-002 themed (16 ANSI colors). Cmd+backtick toggles terminal/conversation. Welcome message displayed. PTY connection deferred to IPC commands module.

CHI-22.title: Implement session persistence and sidebar navigation
CHI-22.notes: IPC commands module (8 commands via Tauri managed state). Session CRUD with DB persistence. Sidebar rewritten with real session list, model badges, relative time, delete. ConversationStore rewritten for session support. Auto-title from first message. 64 Rust tests pass.

CHI-23.title: Build permission dialog UI component
CHI-23.notes: Modal permission dialog with risk-level border (green/amber/red), tool-type badges (blue/amber/purple), 60s timeout auto-deny with countdown bar, keyboard shortcuts (Y/N/A/Escape), focus trap. Wired into MainLayout overlay.

CHI-24.title: Configure cross-platform packaging (.dmg, .msi, .AppImage)
CHI-24.notes: Bundle metadata in tauri.conf.json (category, descriptions, copyright, platform configs). Release workflow: tag-triggered, 3-platform matrix (macOS universal, Ubuntu, Windows), tauri-action@v0, draft releases with install instructions.

CHI-25.title: Initialize Git repository and push to GitHub
CHI-25.notes: Repo at github.com/fcostudios/chief-wiggum. Initial commit with 96 files pushed to main.

CHI-26.title: Implement YOLO Mode (auto-approve all permission requests)
CHI-26.notes: YOLO Mode: PermissionManager yolo_mode with auto-approve path + 4 tests (59 total). YoloWarningDialog with mandatory confirmation. TitleBar Zap toggle + pulsing badge. StatusBar 'YOLO MODE' indicator. Cmd+Shift+Y shortcut. Session-scoped, resets on restart.

CHI-28.title: Set up Playwright + Tauri WebDriver infrastructure

CHI-29.title: Layout shell e2e tests (5 components, ~25 cases)

CHI-30.title: Conversation view e2e tests (4 components, ~25 cases)

CHI-31.title: Permission system e2e tests (2 components, ~17 cases)

CHI-32.title: Terminal & model selector e2e tests (2 components, ~14 cases)

CHI-33.title: Integration & keyboard shortcut e2e tests (~17 cases)

CHI-40.title: Folder picker + project creation via native dialog

CHI-41.title: Project sidebar section with recent projects

CHI-42.title: Detect and display CLAUDE.md from project folder

CHI-43.title: Bind sessions to projects with inherited settings

CHI-36.title: CLI Connection & Streaming (CRITICAL)
CHI-36.notes: ALL 6 tasks complete. App now talks to real Claude Code CLI via PTY.

CHI-45.title: IPC commands for CLI (start, send, stop, status)

CHI-46.title: Streaming event loop (bridge output → Tauri events)

CHI-47.title: Replace mock sendMessage with real CLI streaming

CHI-48.title: Detect Claude Code CLI on startup with error UI

CHI-37.title: Permission Flow Live
CHI-37.notes: All 3 tasks complete. Permission IPC, event pipeline, and YOLO mode wired end-to-end.

CHI-50.title: Wire permission IPC commands
CHI-50.notes: Added Validation error variant, respond_permission and toggle_yolo_mode IPC commands, registered PermissionManager as managed state.

CHI-51.title: Build full permission event pipeline
CHI-51.notes: Added permission:request listener in conversationStore, wired PermissionDialog onRespond to invoke('respond_permission') IPC.

CHI-52.title: Wire YOLO mode frontend toggle to backend IPC
CHI-52.notes: Replaced TODO placeholders with invoke('toggle_yolo_mode') calls in enableYoloMode/disableYoloMode.

CHI-53.title: Cost accumulator service with SQLite persistence

CHI-54.title: Bind StatusBar + DetailsPanel to live cost events

CHI-60.title: Shutdown all CLI processes on app quit
CHI-60.notes: Added Clone derive to SessionBridgeMap, registered window close event handler that calls shutdown_all() via block_on.

CHI-67.title: Native window controls (macOS traffic lights + Windows buttons)
CHI-67.notes: titleBarStyle overlay + hiddenTitle for native macOS traffic lights. Platform detection via @tauri-apps/plugin-os. macOS: 70px spacer, no custom buttons. Windows/Linux: custom minimize/maximize/close buttons.

CHI-69.title: macOS vibrancy effects on sidebar and titlebar

CHI-70.title: Custom scrollbar styling for dark theme
CHI-70.notes: 6px scrollbars, transparent track, rgba thumbs. Applied globally via tokens.css.

CHI-71.title: Message enter/exit animations (slide + fade)
CHI-71.notes: fade-in-up keyframe with staggered animation-delay per message. 300ms entrance with ease-out. prefers-reduced-motion compliant.

CHI-76.title: Command palette UI (Cmd+K, fuzzy search, categorized actions)

CHI-78.title: Custom context menus (messages, sessions, code blocks)

CHI-80.title: Conversation empty state redesign (sample prompts, personality)

CHI-82.title: Placeholder views for Agents/Diff (informative, not broken)

CHI-84.title: Sidebar collapsed icon-rail mode (48px with tooltips)

CHI-86.title: Session rename inline + session actions menu

CHI-87.title: View tabs with icons + count badges

critical_path: CHI-37 (permission flow) DONE. CHI-60 (shutdown) DONE. CHI-67 (native controls) DONE. CHI-70 (scrollbars) DONE. CHI-71 (message animations) DONE. Next: CHI-39 (session lifecycle — CHI-56/57/58/59), CHI-61 remaining (CHI-68/69), UX polish.
ux_quick_wins: CHI-80 (empty state redesign — high personality impact)

SPEC-002.changes: Added tool use colors (§3.5), toast colors (§3.6), 7 new component specs (§10.11-10.17: ToolUseBlock, ThinkingBlock, Toast, CommandPalette, ProjectSelector, StreamingBubble, Scrollbar)

SPEC-003.changes: Added 6 Phase 2 interaction flows (§4.7-4.12: CLI detection, project selection, real streaming, YOLO toggle, session lifecycle, cost tracking), keyboard shortcut updates, UX Polish specifications (§10.1-10.6) for all 6 UX epics

SPEC-004.changes: Added Phase 2 files to monorepo structure, expanded module/store tables with Phase column, Phase 2 IPC contracts (§4.4), 3 data flow diagrams (§5.3-5.5: CLI detection, session bridge lifecycle, cost tracking), Phase 2 types

TASKS-002.changes: Full Phase 2 task breakdown: 5 core epics (21 tasks) + 6 UX polish epics (26 tasks), spec references on every task, dependency graph, gate criteria

spec_updates.notes: All 21 remaining Phase 2 Linear issues updated with spec references and detailed acceptance criteria

notes: Phase 1: Foundation COMPLETE. Phase 2: CHI-36 (CLI Connection), CHI-37 (Permission Flow) DONE. CHI-40, CHI-60, CHI-67, CHI-70, CHI-71 DONE. Frontend design overhaul applied (Noir Command Center aesthetic, Sora font, ambient glows, entrance animations). 71 Rust tests pass. Next: CHI-39 (session lifecycle), UX polish (CHI-61, CHI-62).

environment.notes: Full toolchain ready. 71 Rust tests pass (7 new SessionBridgeMap tests). Frontend checks all pass. CI + release workflows on GitHub Actions. tauri-plugin-dialog added for native folder picker.
